'''Khwir''' was the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[First Mate/Legends|First Mate]] on the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Urias Xhaxin]]'s [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B escort frigate]], ''[[Free Lance]]''.
